#vent-detail-container: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 80vh; text-align: center; font-family: monospace;
#vent-back-button: padding: 10px 20px; background: #333; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s;
